building_row.open_questions: Verify whether the target unit sits away from Sunset Boulevard and courtyard activity. Confirm whether any EV charging exists, because current public materials do not clearly show it. Get the full pet addendum and fee sheet in writing, since public pet terms are only partially visible through Zillow snippets. Confirm after-hours package access, parking assignment, and whether the office or den layouts work well for daily remote work.
building_row.notes: Element WeHo is one of the stronger paper fits on essentials. Official and major-listing sources align on in-unit washer/dryer, dishwasher, AC, package concierge, controlled access or gated entry, garage parking, pool, gym, pet-friendly policy, and larger floor plans with dedicated office or den space. The issue is noise, not utility. The building is openly described as sitting right at Crescent Heights and Sunset with the action of West Hollywood at your doorstep, which is great for access but a meaningful quiet risk for street-facing units. Management evidence is thinner than the amenity evidence: Moss & Company is clearly disclosed, a property manager is listed on site, and the building looks professionally merchandised, but strong public resident-review depth did not surface in the retrieved sources. Because the basics are so good, this is not a reject, but the location exposure and missing EV or fee clarity keep it in research_complete rather than tour_candidate status until unit-specific details are verified.

evidence_rows.claim: The official amenities page lists package concierge, controlled access, fitness center, garage, outdoor pool, chef-grade Viking kitchen appliances, and LG in-home washer/dryer.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Official building amenities include modern outdoor pool, package concierge, controlled access, fully-equipped fitness center, and garage; unit finishes include dishwasher-adjacent chef’s kitchen setup and LG washer/dryer.

evidence_rows.claim: Moss & Company is disclosed as the current management company on Element WeHo’s official site.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: The official page footer states © 2019 Moss & Company.

evidence_rows.claim: The official home page says Element WeHo sits right at the intersection of Crescent Heights and Sunset Boulevard with West Hollywood action at the doorstep.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Official copy emphasizes proximity to Sunset Strip, Chateau Marmont, and surrounding activity rather than insulation from street noise.

evidence_rows.claim: The official floor-plan page shows current one-bedroom plus office layouts starting around $4,250 and confirms in-home office or den space, in-home washer/dryer, and walk-in closets.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Current floor-plan entries include 1 bed plus office layouts priced from $4,250 to $5,550 and larger layouts above that range.

evidence_rows.claim: Apartments.com corroborates gated entry, package service, concierge, pool, fitness center, bicycle storage, AC, dishwasher, washer/dryer, and balcony-capable layouts.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: The listing also notes the property manager is on site and highlights views plus office or den layouts.

evidence_rows.claim: Pricing is public but the fee stack is still incomplete in self-serve materials.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Official pages show current base rent bands for floor plans, but a detailed fee guide for utilities, parking, pets, and add-ons was not surfaced in the retrieved public pages.

evidence_rows.claim: Zillow snippets confirm pet-friendly status and publish pet terms, but the weight limits appear inconsistent in the surfaced text and need direct confirmation.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Zillow snippet shows up to 2 cats with $500 deposit and $50 monthly fee, and dogs with $500 deposit and $50 monthly fee, but the visible weight-limit text is internally inconsistent.

packet_markdown:
# Element WeHo building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: element-weho-1425-n-crescent-heights-blvd
- Address: 1425 N Crescent Heights Blvd, WeHo 90046
- Primary URL: https://www.elementweho.com/
- Management company: Moss & Company
- Recommended status: research_complete
- Last updated: 2026-03-25

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 2 (medium, evidence count 3)
- Management: 3 (low, evidence count 3)
- Amenity: 5 (high, evidence count 6)
- Community stability: 3 (low, evidence count 2)
- Location fit: 5
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: medium
- Location noise risk: high
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] Official amenities confirm package concierge, controlled access, garage, pool, gym, and LG in-home washer/dryer. Source: Element WeHo Amenities & Features (https://www.elementweho.com/amenities-features/).
- [official] Moss & Company is disclosed in the site footer. Source: Element WeHo Amenities & Features (https://www.elementweho.com/amenities-features/).
- [official] The home page explicitly places the building at Crescent Heights and Sunset with action at your doorstep. Source: Element WeHo Home (https://www.elementweho.com/).
- [official] Current floor plans include 1-bedroom plus office layouts starting around $4,250. Source: Element WeHo Floor Plans (https://www.elementweho.com/floorplans/).
- [review] Apartments.com corroborates gated entry, package service, concierge, pool, fitness center, and office or den layouts. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/element-weho-west-hollywood-ca/wn8k8ek/).
- [review] Zillow snippets confirm pet-friendly status but not a clean, current pet addendum. Source: Zillow building FAQs (https://www.zillow.com/building-apps/lot_1009394528).

## Open questions
- Is the target unit set back from Sunset or exposed directly to the intersection?
- Does the building actually offer EV charging?
- What are the exact current pet, parking, and package-access terms?

## Notes
Element WeHo checks almost every functional box, but it sits in a location that is hard to describe as inherently quiet. Unit placement will matter a lot here.
